channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Kansas center Hunter Dickinson ejected for kicking Duke's Maliq Brown in the head
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Kansas center Hunter Dickinson was ejected midway through the second half of the top-ranked Jayhawks' 75-72 victory over No. 11 Duke on Tuesday night for kicking the Blue Devils' Maliq Brown in the head.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Bucks hold Antetokounmpo out of NBA Cup game at Miami with swelling in left knee
item.description: Giannis Antetokounmpo, the league’s leading scorer this season, was unexpectedly held out of the Milwaukee Bucks’ NBA Cup game at the Miami Heat on Tuesday night with swelling in his left knee.
item.dc:creator: Tim Reynolds, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Lewandowski scores 100th Champions League goal. Man City draws Feyenoord but Haaland nets 2
item.description: Robert Lewandowski joined Cristiano Ronaldo and Lionel Messi as the only players in Champions League history with 100 or more goals. But Erling Haaland is on a faster pace than anyone by boosting his total to 46 goals at age 24 on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Juan Soto could decide on his next team before or during baseball's winter meetings
item.description: Juan Soto appears on a timetable to decide on where to sign either before or during baseball’s winter meetings in Dallas, which run from Dec. 8-12.
item.dc:creator: Ronald Blum, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Lewandowski joins Ronaldo and Messi in Champions League 100-goal club. Haaland nets 2 but City draws
item.description: ROME (AP) — Robert Lewandowski joined Cristiano Ronaldo and Lionel Messi as the only players in Champions League history with 100 or more goals. But Erling Haaland is on a faster pace than anyone by boosting his total to 46 goals at age 24 on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW DAMPF, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Kylie Kelce says she’s ‘not going to stop cursing’ in front of kids in trailer for new podcast
item.description: Kylie Kelce, wife of former NFL player Jason Kelce, revealed in a trailer for her new podcast she has no plans to censor her language in front of their three girls anytime soon.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: PWHL New York Sirens' trajectory points up with addition of rookie star Sarah Fillier and new home
item.description: Soon after the final refrains of Frank Sinatra’s iconic “New York, New York” finished playing over the loudspeakers to signify New York's preseason 5-2 victory over Toronto, Sarah Fillier took a seat at the podium to go over her three-goal outing.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Rams WR Demarcus Robinson arrested on suspicion of DUI after loss to Eagles
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Los Angeles Rams receiver Demarcus Robinson was arrested on suspicion of driving under the influence early Monday morning.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Family mourns death of 27-year-old woman in Harvey train crash
item.description: A 27-year-old woman was killed in a car versus train crash in Harvey, IL, leaving behind a family grieving for her loss.
item.dc:creator: Andrea Medina, WGN 9

item.title: Buccaneers QB Baker Mayfield seeks $12M in lawsuit against his father's company
item.description: An ongoing dispute between Tampa Bay Buccaneers quarterback Baker Mayfield and his family in Austin has boiled over into a lawsuit.
item.dc:creator: Billy Gates, WGN 9

item.title: Verstappen captures 4th F1 championship after Mercedes sweep of Las Vegas Grand Prix
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Asked how he planned to celebrate his fourth consecutive Formula 1 championship, Max Verstappen did a quick scan of the room searching for a drop of alcohol. “Well, I ran out of beer, so I don't know,” he said. “Maybe another one, and then maybe I switch to something else.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Scotty Pippen Jr. scores career-high 30 points in Grizzlies' 142-131 win over Bulls
item.description: Scotty Pippen Jr. had a career-best 30 points with 10 assists to lead the Memphis Grizzlies past the Chicago Bulls 142-131 on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Utah HC busts out of offensive slump with 6-1 victory
item.description: PITTSBURGH (ABC4 Sports) - After getting shut out for the fifth time of the season, the Utah Hockey team scored a regulation-time season-high six goals in a 6-1 rout over the Pittsburgh Penguins Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Barnes leads Aggies to 41-20 win over SDSU
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - After a rough start to the season, Utah State is finishing strong. Bryson Barnes accounted for 323 yards and four touchdowns to lead Utah State over San Diego State 41-20 on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Argentina's Racing wins its first Copa Sudamericana championship by beating Brazil's Cruzeiro 3-1
item.description: Gaston Martirena and Adrian Martinez scored first-half goals as Argentina's Racing won its first Copa Sudamericana championship by beating Brazil's Cruzeiro 3-1 in the final on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: BYU sweeps men's and women's cross-country national titles
item.description: WACO, Tex. (ABC4 Sports) - BYU became just the fifth school ever to win national titles in both men's and women's cross-country. The #1 ranked women's team won its sixth in program history, with a team score of 147 at the Zimmer Championship Course Saturday morning.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Andy Murray will coach Novak Djokovic through the Australian Open
item.description: The recently retired Andy Murray is going to team up with longtime rival Novak Djokovic as his coach, they both announced Saturday, with plans to prepare for — and work together through — the Australian Open in January.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Bulls host the Grizzlies in non-conference play
item.description: Memphis Grizzlies (9-7, ninth in the Western Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (7-10, seventh in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Saturday, 8 p.m. EST BETMGM SPORTSBOOK LINE: Grizzlies -5.5; over/under is 242.5 BOTTOM LINE: The Memphis Grizzlies visit the Chicago Bulls in a non-conference matchup.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Police may have suspects in Patrick Mahomes, Travis Kelce burglaries
item.description: One week after high end burglaries targeting Kansas City Chiefs stars Patrick Mahomes and Travis Kelce, FOX4 is learning who could be behind them.
item.dc:creator: Malik Jackson, NewsNation
